text:
Once upon a time there was a young girl named Lily. She loved birds. She watched them from her window every day. One snowy morning she heard strange noises. She peeked out and saw two birds fighting. She picked them up and took them indoors.

They sat on her branch. A week later they flew away. She missed them. She got a birdhouse. She put the birds inside. They ate seeds. She watched them sleep. She felt happy. She named them sleepy. They would fly at night. She liked that. They sang songs.
